User Story: As a deal originator, I want to create a new deal with title, project type, genre, loan amount, interest rate, and term so that I can track it through the pipeline.
As a deal originator, I want to set deal status (pipeline, active, closed, declined) so that I can track deal lifecycle.
As a portfolio manager, I want to see a dashboard with deal counts and total committed capital by status so that I have a real-time portfolio snapshot.
As a deal originator, I want to attach producer, director, and cast summary to a deal so that creative packages are tracked alongside financial terms.
As a deal originator, I want to search and filter deals by title, borrower, status, or genre so that I can quickly find specific deals.
As a portfolio manager, I want to see a deal aging report (days in pipeline, days active) so that I can identify stalled deals.
As a deal originator, I want to edit an existing deal's terms (amount, rate, maturity) so that I can reflect renegotiated terms.
As a compliance officer, I want deal approval workflows (submitted, under review, approved, rejected) so that no deal proceeds without proper sign-off.
As a portfolio manager, I want to export deal lists to CSV/Excel so that I can share reports with stakeholders.
As a deal originator, I want to clone an existing deal as a template for similar transactions so that I save data entry time.
As a relationship manager, I want to add contacts with name, company, role, email, phone, and type so that I have a centralized directory.
As a deal originator, I want to link contacts to deals with a relationship type so that I can see who is involved in each transaction.
As a relationship manager, I want to search contacts by name, company, or type so that I can quickly look up counterparties.
As a relationship manager, I want to see an activity log per contact (deals, interactions, notes) so that I have full relationship history.
As a relationship manager, I want to import contacts from a CSV so that I can bulk-load my existing CRM data.
As a deal originator, I want to see all deals associated with a contact so that I understand the depth of the relationship.
As a relationship manager, I want to tag contacts with custom labels (e.g., key account, new relationship) so that I can segment my network.
As a compliance officer, I want to flag contacts requiring KYC/AML refresh so that we stay compliant.
As a sales manager, I want to create sales contracts per deal, territory, and distributor with MG amounts so that I can track distribution commitments.
As a collections analyst, I want to record collections against contracts (amount due, received, status) so that I can track cash inflows.
As a sales manager, I want to see contracts by territory across 19 markets so that I have a global sales map.
As a collections analyst, I want to flag overdue collections automatically so that I can prioritize follow-ups.
As a sales manager, I want to compare projected vs. actual collections per contract so that I can identify variance early.
As a finance director, I want a waterfall report showing how collections flow from gross to net (commissions, fees, holdbacks) so that I can model true cash receipts.
As a sales manager, I want to attach contract PDFs and delivery schedules to sales contracts so that I have a complete record.
As a finance director, I want multi-currency collection tracking with FX conversion to a base currency so that I can report in USD.
As a sales manager, I want to generate territory-by-territory sales reports for investor updates so that I can share distribution progress.
As a risk analyst, I want AI-generated credit scores (0-100) for distributors and producers so that I can assess counterparty strength.
As a risk analyst, I want risk tier classifications (AAA through CCC) so that I can quickly categorize counterparties.
As a risk analyst, I want to see payment reliability scores and factor breakdowns so that I understand what drives the rating.
As a deal originator, I want to see credit ratings inline when selecting a distributor for a deal so that I make informed decisions.
As a risk analyst, I want to override or annotate AI-generated ratings with manual assessments so that I can incorporate offline knowledge.
As a risk analyst, I want credit rating history over time per contact so that I can spot trends (improving or deteriorating).
As a portfolio manager, I want a portfolio-level counterparty concentration report so that I can identify exposure risks.
As a finance analyst, I want to record disbursements, repayments, fees, and interest by deal so that I maintain a transaction ledger.
As a finance analyst, I want summary metrics (total disbursed, repaid, fees, interest, net position) so that I have a financial overview.
As a finance analyst, I want to search transactions by deal, type, counterparty, or reference so that I can audit specific entries.
As a finance director, I want to reconcile expected vs. actual cash flows by deal so that I can spot discrepancies.
As a finance director, I want to generate a P&L statement per deal (revenue, costs, net) so that I can assess deal profitability.
As an auditor, I want full audit trail with timestamps, user IDs, and before/after values on all transaction edits so that I can trace changes.
As a finance analyst, I want to export the transaction ledger to CSV for import into our accounting system so that I avoid double-entry.
As a finance director, I want automated interest accrual calculations based on deal terms so that I don't compute manually.
As a deal originator, I want to create notes, tasks, and notifications linked to deals so that I track action items.
As a team member, I want to set due dates on tasks and see overdue items flagged so that nothing falls through the cracks.
As a team member, I want to mark tasks as complete with a checkbox so that I track progress.
As a manager, I want to assign tasks to specific team members so that responsibilities are clear.
As a team member, I want email or in-app notifications when a task is assigned to me or approaching its deadline so that I stay on top of deadlines.
As a deal originator, I want to attach files to messages (e.g., markup PDFs, term sheets) so that communications have full context.
As a manager, I want a team task board (kanban or list view) showing all open tasks across deals so that I can manage workload.
As a sales agent, I want AI-generated territory-by-territory MG projections based on comparable films so that I can set realistic pricing.
As a sales agent, I want to search TMDB/OMDB for comparable films and see their actual box office and budget data so that I have market benchmarks.
As a deal originator, I want to generate a sales estimate for a new project by providing genre, budget, and cast so that I can evaluate deal viability.
As a sales agent, I want to manually adjust AI-generated estimates per territory so that I can incorporate my market knowledge.
As a sales agent, I want to save and version sales estimates so that I can track how projections evolve.
As an investor, I want to see estimate confidence ranges (low/mid/high) per territory so that I understand the risk band.
As a sales agent, I want to select specific comp films rather than relying only on AI selection so that I control the benchmarking set.
As a risk analyst, I want AI-generated risk scores across 6 dimensions (script complexity, budget feasibility, schedule, jurisdiction, crew/talent, completion) so that I have a structured risk view.
As a risk analyst, I want an overall risk tier (Low, Moderate, Elevated, High) so that I can quickly classify projects.
As a risk analyst, I want AI-suggested mitigations for each risk factor so that I can build a risk management plan.
As a risk analyst, I want to attach a risk assessment to a deal so that underwriting files include the analysis.
As a risk analyst, I want to weight risk dimensions differently based on deal type (e.g., VFX-heavy vs. indie drama) so that scoring reflects actual risk profile.
As a portfolio manager, I want an aggregate risk heatmap across the portfolio so that I can see concentration of high-risk deals.
As a risk analyst, I want to compare risk scores across deals side-by-side so that I can benchmark relative risk.
As a producer, I want AI-generated budgets in 3 scenarios (low/mid/high) with line-item breakdowns so that I can evaluate budget ranges.
As a producer, I want budget categories (ATL, BTL-Production, BTL-Post, Insurance, Financing, Contingency) so that I get an industry-standard breakdown.
As a producer, I want to adjust individual line items after generation so that I can refine the AI estimate.
As a finance director, I want to compare generated budgets to actual costs as production progresses so that I can track cost overruns.
As a producer, I want to import an existing budget (CSV or Movie Magic format) so that I can use the platform for tracking, not just generation.
As a producer, I want to export budgets to PDF or Excel so that I can share with financiers.
As a line producer, I want AI-generated day-by-day shooting schedules with location clustering so that I minimize company moves.
As a line producer, I want schedules to include call time, wrap time, scenes, and location per day so that I have a complete stripboard.
As a line producer, I want to manually reorder or adjust schedule days after generation so that I can handle real-world constraints.
As an AD, I want to flag weather-dependent or night-shoot days so that I can plan contingencies.
As a line producer, I want to link schedule to budget so that daily burn rate is visible so that I can track cost per shoot day.
As a line producer, I want to export schedules to PDF or industry formats (Gorilla, StudioBinder) so that I can share with crew.
As a producer, I want to search a global database of film tax incentive programs by country and type so that I can identify funding opportunities.
As a producer, I want a rebate calculator (spend x rebate %) so that I can estimate the tax benefit.
As a finance director, I want to link incentive programs to deals so that I can track applied vs. approved amounts.
As a producer, I want alerts when incentive programs change (new programs, sunset dates, rule changes) so that I don't miss opportunities.
As a finance director, I want to stack multiple incentive programs per deal (e.g., federal + state + regional) so that I can maximize soft funding.
As a producer, I want to see eligibility requirements (minimum spend, cultural tests, residency) per program so that I can assess qualification.
As a finance director, I want to model the impact of incentive timing on cash flow (processing days, payment schedule) so that I can plan liquidity.
As a deal originator, I want an auto-generated 20-item closing checklist per deal (Legal, Insurance, Financial, Distribution, Tax, Compliance) so that I have a structured closing process.
As a deal originator, I want to check off items as completed and see a visual progress bar so that I track closing progress.
As a deal originator, I want to upload and version documents per deal so that I have a complete data room.
As legal counsel, I want to customize the checklist items per deal (add, remove, reorder) so that it reflects the specific transaction structure.
As a deal originator, I want to assign checklist items to specific team members with deadlines so that closing tasks are delegated.
As an investor, I want read-only data room access with audit trail (who viewed what, when) so that I can review deal documents securely.
As a deal originator, I want automated reminders for incomplete checklist items approaching a deadline so that closing stays on track.
As legal counsel, I want document templates (loan agreement, security agreement, inter-party agreement) so that I can generate first drafts quickly.
As a marketing exec, I want AI-predicted audience segments (3-5 demographics with age ranges and percentages) so that I can target campaigns.
As a marketing exec, I want a marketing channel plan with estimated spend per channel so that I can build a P&A budget.
As a marketing exec, I want a release strategy (domestic timing, international rollout, platform strategy) so that I can plan distribution.
As a marketing exec, I want to adjust AI-generated audience segments based on test screening data so that I refine targeting.
As a marketing exec, I want to benchmark P&A spend against comparable films so that I can justify the budget.
As a sales agent, I want to include audience analysis in territory sales packages so that distributors see the marketing support plan.
As a casting director, I want to search actors and directors by name with popularity scores and known-for credits so that I can evaluate talent.
As a producer, I want AI-recommended cast with heat scores, genre fit, salary tier, and international sales impact so that I can optimize the package.
As a producer, I want package simulations (2-3 cast combinations with projected domestic/international returns) so that I can model different packages.
As a sales agent, I want to see which actors drive value in specific territories so that I can tailor sales pitches.
As a producer, I want to track actor availability and scheduling conflicts so that I can plan casting around real constraints.
As a producer, I want to link talent recommendations to deals so that cast-finance analysis is connected.
As a sales agent, I want to compare talent value by territory (e.g., Actor A strong in Asia vs. Actor B strong in Europe) so that I can optimize the global package.
As a user, I want to register and log in with email and password so that my data is secure and isolated.
As a user, I want a 3-pane layout (navigation, content, inspector) so that I can work efficiently without page reloads.
As a user, I want to chat with an AI assistant that can access all platform tools so that I can work conversationally.
As a user, I want structured chat commands (deal:list, portfolio, help) for quick access so that I can work faster than clicking through menus.
As a user, I want chat history preserved across sessions so that I can resume previous conversations.
As an admin, I want role-based access control (admin, analyst, viewer) so that I can restrict sensitive data.
As a user, I want SSO login (Google, Microsoft) so that I don't manage another password.
As a user, I want the platform to work on mobile/tablet so that I can check deals on the go.
As an admin, I want an audit log of all user actions (logins, edits, views) so that I have a compliance trail.
As a user, I want to customize my dashboard with widgets (deal pipeline, overdue tasks, portfolio snapshot) so that I see what matters most.
As a user, I want dark mode so that I can work comfortably in low-light environments.
As a team lead, I want multi-user collaboration on the same deal (shared notes, live status) so that the team stays aligned.
As a portfolio manager, I want a portfolio dashboard with charts (deal volume over time, status distribution, capital deployed) so that I can present to stakeholders.
As a finance director, I want to generate quarterly investor reports (deal summaries, collections, P&L) so that I meet reporting obligations.
As an analyst, I want to build custom reports by selecting fields, filters, and groupings so that I can answer ad hoc questions.
As a portfolio manager, I want scheduled report delivery (email PDF weekly/monthly) so that stakeholders get updates without logging in.
As an analyst, I want data export to CSV/Excel across all modules so that I can do deeper analysis externally.
